headline: SpaceX may soon hit your portfolio: Here's what to know
summary: SpaceX shares have soared about 50% in the first days of trading. That has some people wondering whether they missed their chance if they didn't buy already. Yet many investors, including retirement savers, may already have access to this high-profile investment without ever purchasing the stock. CNBC's Sharon Epperson joins 'Squawk Box' with the details.

headline: BlackRock Inc. (NYSE:BLK) Poised for a Breakout as Strong Growth Meets Tight Technical Setup
summary: BlackRock (BLK) combines strong growth fundamentals with a tight technical consolidation pattern. With a 22% revenue surge, solid health metrics, and a setup rating of 7, the stock is poised near a key resistance zone for a potential breakout.

headline: BlackRock (BLK) Launches Bitcoin Income ETF To Expand Its Digital Assets Suite
summary: BlackRock (NYSE:BLK) has launched the iShares Bitcoin Premium Income ETF (ticker: BITA), adding a new product to its digital assets line up. The ETF is designed to provide income from bitcoin exposure, using a structure that differs from traditional bitcoin products. This move expands BlackRock's presence in digital asset ETFs at a time when more mainstream financial products linked to crypto are reaching the market. BlackRock enters this launch with its shares trading at $1,052.23 and a...
